hero.headline: AI-Powered Learning That Adapts to Every Student
hero.subheadline: No Learner Left Behind. Personalized education powered by Brain Clone AI technology that creates a unique learning profile for every student.
hero.feature1: Adapts to every learning style in real-time
hero.slide2Subheadline: Our AI adapts in real time, identifying strengths and gaps to create a custom curriculum that keeps students engaged and on track.
hero.slide2Feature1: Watch your child engage with AI tutors
hero.slide3Headline: Built for IEP Students, Loved by All
hero.slide3Subheadline: Whether your child has an IEP, a 504 plan, or just needs extra support, Aivo's Brain Clone AI builds a learning experience as unique as they are.
hero.slide4Headline: 7 Expert AI Tutors, One Personalized Journey
hero.slide4Subheadline: From math to reading comprehension, our specialized AI tutors meet students where they are and guide them forward with patience, encouragement, and adaptive intelligence.
hero.slide5Subheadline: A beautiful learner dashboard gives students, parents, and teachers instant visibility into progress, streaks, and AI-powered recommendations.
hero.slide6Subheadline: Whether it's a tablet, laptop, or phone, Aivo delivers a seamless learning experience that keeps students focused and engaged, anywhere they are.
hero.slide6Feature1: Works on tablets, laptops, and phones
hero.slide6Feature2: Offline mode for learning without Wi-Fi
hero.slide7Headline: A Learning Partner for the Whole Family
hero.slide7Subheadline: Parents love joining in. Aivo makes it easy for families to learn together, track progress, and celebrate achievements side by side.
hero.slide8Headline: Learning That Goes Where They Go
hero.slide8Subheadline: From the school bus to the living room, Aivo's mobile-first design means your child's AI tutors are always just a tap away.
hero.slide9Headline: Parents and Teachers, Always in the Loop
hero.slide9Subheadline: Real-time insights keep everyone aligned. Teachers get classroom analytics while parents see exactly how their child is progressing at home.
hero.slide9Feature1: Shared dashboards for parents and teachers
hero.slide9Feature3: IEP goal tracking with instant alerts

features.title: Everything Your Students Need to Succeed
features.subtitle: AIVO combines cutting-edge AI with proven educational science to create a learning experience that adapts to every student.
features.brainCloneDesc: Our proprietary AI creates a digital twin of each student's learning profile, adapting in real-time to their strengths, gaps, and learning style.
features.adaptiveDesc: Every lesson, quiz, and exercise is dynamically generated to match the student's current level and IEP goals. No two learning paths are alike.
features.iepDesc: Upload existing IEP documents and watch AIVO automatically align curriculum, accommodations, and progress tracking to each student's plan.
features.tutorsDesc: Seven specialized AI tutors, each with unique personalities and teaching styles across every subject area.
features.homeworkDesc: Students can snap a photo of any assignment and get step-by-step guidance (not answers) that builds real understanding and problem-solving skills.
features.gamificationDesc: XP points, streaks, badges, and leaderboards keep students motivated. Parents and teachers can see engagement metrics in real-time dashboards.

howItWorks.title: How AIVO Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to personalized learning that adapts to every student's unique needs.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Complete a quick learning assessment and upload your IEP if you have one. AIVO builds a comprehensive understanding of how you learn best.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our AI creates a digital twin of your learning profile. It knows your strengths, identifies gaps, and personalizes every piece of content just for you.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Dive into adaptive lessons, chat with AI tutors, complete quests, and track your progress. Your Brain Clone evolves with you, getting smarter every session.

aiTutors.title: Meet Your AI Learning Team
aiTutors.subtitle: Five specialized AI tutors, each with a unique personality and teaching style designed to make every subject engaging and fun.
aiTutors.novaPersonality: A cosmic explorer who turns math into an intergalactic adventure. Nova makes algebra feel like navigating star charts and geometry like designing spacecraft.
aiTutors.sagePersonality: A master storyteller who brings literature to life. Sage turns reading comprehension into detective work and writing into world-building.
aiTutors.sparkPersonality: An enthusiastic inventor who makes science experiments feel like magic. Spark turns every hypothesis into an exciting discovery mission.
aiTutors.chronoPersonality: A time-traveling guide who makes history feel like a personal adventure. Chrono transports students to ancient civilizations and pivotal moments.
aiTutors.pixelPersonality: A friendly pair-programming buddy who makes coding feel like building with digital LEGO. Pixel turns debugging into puzzle-solving and algorithms into game design.

socialProof.badge: Trusted by 150+ students in pilot programs across the country

audienceTabs.title: Built for Everyone in Education
audienceTabs.subtitle: Whether you are a parent, teacher, or district administrator, AIVO has the tools you need.
audienceTabs.parentsHeadline: Give Your Child a Learning Superpower
audienceTabs.parentsSubheadline: AIVO creates a personalized learning companion that adapts to your child's unique needs, whether they have an IEP, are gifted, or simply learn differently.
audienceTabs.parentsBenefit1Desc: Brain Clone AI builds a unique learning profile, adapting every lesson to your child's pace, style, and interests.
audienceTabs.parentsBenefit2Desc: FERPA and COPPA compliant. Your child's data is encrypted, never sold, and you control what's shared.
audienceTabs.parentsBenefit3Desc: See exactly what your child is learning, where they excel, and where they need support, updated in real-time.
audienceTabs.parentsBenefit4Desc: Offline-capable mobile app means learning continues on road trips, in waiting rooms, or at grandma's house.
audienceTabs.parentsStep1Desc: Answer a few questions about your child's age, grade, interests, and learning needs. Upload their IEP if they have one.
audienceTabs.parentsStep2Desc: Your child gets matched with AI tutors who match their personality. Nova for math, Sage for reading, Spark for science, and more.
audienceTabs.parentsStep3Desc: Track progress on your parent dashboard. See skills mastered, time spent learning, and areas where they're growing.
audienceTabs.parentsTestimonialQuote: My son has ADHD and was struggling in traditional school. With AIVO, he actually asks to do his lessons. The AI tutors keep him engaged in a way his textbooks never could.
audienceTabs.teachersSubheadline: AIVO handles differentiation, progress monitoring, and IEP tracking so you can focus on what matters most: connecting with your students.
audienceTabs.teachersBenefit1Desc: Automated lesson differentiation, progress reports, and IEP documentation free up your most valuable resource: time.
audienceTabs.teachersBenefit2Desc: See every student's progress at a glance. Identify who needs intervention before they fall behind.
audienceTabs.teachersBenefit3Desc: Upload IEPs and AIVO automatically aligns content, tracks goals, and generates compliant progress reports.
audienceTabs.teachersBenefit4Desc: One lesson, 30 versions. AIVO automatically adapts content for every learner in your classroom.
audienceTabs.teachersStep1Desc: Import your roster from Clever or ClassLink. Upload IEPs and set learning goals for each student.
audienceTabs.teachersStep2Desc: Create assignments that automatically differentiate for each student. AIVO adjusts difficulty, scaffolding, and format.
audienceTabs.teachersStep3Desc: Track progress in real-time. Generate IEP progress reports, parent updates, and intervention recommendations.
audienceTabs.teachersTestimonialQuote: I have 28 students with 8 different IEPs. AIVO lets me actually differentiate for each one without working until midnight. It's the tool I've been waiting 15 years for.
audienceTabs.districtsSubheadline: AIVO provides enterprise-grade AI learning infrastructure with FERPA compliance, SIS integration, and district-wide analytics.
audienceTabs.districtsBenefit1Desc: Native Clever and ClassLink integration. Automatic roster sync, single sign-on, and grade passback.
audienceTabs.districtsBenefit2Desc: SOC 2 Type II certified. Student data is encrypted at rest and in transit. Annual third-party audits.
audienceTabs.districtsBenefit3Desc: Track performance across schools, grades, and demographics. Identify equity gaps and measure intervention effectiveness.
audienceTabs.districtsBenefit4Desc: Implementation specialists, professional development training, and 24/7 technical support for your team.
audienceTabs.districtsStep1Desc: Start with a 30-day pilot in select classrooms. We handle setup, training, and provide a dedicated success manager.
audienceTabs.districtsStep2Desc: Review pilot data: engagement metrics, learning gains, teacher satisfaction, and IEP compliance improvements.
audienceTabs.districtsStep3Desc: Roll out across schools with SIS integration, custom policies, and district admin dashboards.
audienceTabs.districtsTestimonialQuote: We piloted AIVO in 12 classrooms and saw a 31% improvement in reading scores for students with IEPs. We're now rolling it out district-wide.

testimonials.title: What People Are Saying
testimonials.quote1: My son has ADHD and was struggling in traditional school. With AIVO, he actually asks to do his lessons. The AI tutors keep him engaged in a way his textbooks never could.
testimonials.quote2: I have 28 students with 8 different IEPs. AIVO lets me actually differentiate for each one without working until midnight. It's the tool I've been waiting 15 years for.
testimonials.quote3: We piloted AIVO in 12 classrooms and saw a 31% improvement in reading scores for students with IEPs. We're now rolling it out district-wide.
testimonials.quote4: The Brain Clone AI is remarkable. It figured out that my daughter learns math better with visual models in just two sessions. Her confidence has skyrocketed.
testimonials.quote5: AIVO's IEP tracking saves me hours every week. Progress reports that used to take all weekend are now generated automatically with data I actually trust.
testimonials.quote6: As a homeschool parent with three kids at different levels, Aivo has been a game-changer. Each child gets exactly what they need, and I can track it all from one dashboard.
